title: CNPCs BBS Addon
description: Transform your CustomNPCs with stunning BBS morph forms! This addon bridges CustomNPCs and BBS Mod, allowing you to give NPCs any BBS model appearance with full animation support.
body:
### CNPCs BBS Addon

**The ultimate bridge between CustomNPCs and BBS Mod!**

Transform your CustomNPC entities with beautiful BBS morph forms. Perfect for RPG servers, adventure maps, and immersive storytelling.

---

### ✨ Features

- 🎨 **BBS Form Tool** - A special item to assign BBS forms to any CustomNPC
- 🔄 **Full Animation Support** - Walking, idle, jumping, and all BBS animations work flawlessly
- 🌐 **Multiplayer Ready** - Form appearances sync across all players
- 💾 **Persistent Forms** - NPC appearances survive server restarts and deaths
- 🌍 **27+ Languages** - Full localization support including English, Turkish, German, Spanish, French, Russian, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and many more!
- ⚡ **Optimized Performance** - Efficient rendering with smart caching

---

### 📖 How to Use

1. Get the **BBS Form Tool** from the Creative menu (CNPCs BBS Addon tab)
2. **Right-click** on any CustomNPC to open the BBS Form selector
3. Choose your desired BBS form/model
4. **Shift+Right-click** to remove the BBS form and restore original NPC appearance

---

### Requirements

| Mod | Version |
|-----|---------|
| Minecraft | 1.20.1 |
| Fabric Loader | ≥0.16.0 |
| Fabric API | ≥0.92.0 |
| CustomNPCs | Latest |
| BBS Mod | Latest |

---

### 🔗 Links

- **Discord:** https://discord.gg/9af9S9AQ2h

### ⚙️ Compatibility Notice

To play this mod on **Forge**, you must also install **Sinytra Connector**.
